the Chronic Condition 
Warehouse (CCW) Alzheimer's disease and related disorders or senile dementia indicator. The variable 
will be blank for beneficiaries that have never had the condition. 

SHORT NAME: ALZHDMTE 

LONG NAME: ALZH_DEMEN_EVER 

TYPE: DATE 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: CCW (derived) 

VALUES: — 

COMMENT: The earliest possible date for anyone in the CCW is January 1, 1999. If the beneficiary became eligible 
for Medicare after that, the earliest possible date will be some time after
